entertainment.title: Is Nani's The Paradise delayed? Makers dispel ‘baseless rumours’ about reshoots and confirm its release in August
entertainment.summary: Nani's The Paradise was supposed to be released in theatres a week after Dhurandhar 2 and Toxic. It was then postponed.

entertainment.title: Chitrangada Singh says she was once considered for a film directed by Aditya Dhar: ‘It was almost getting done’
entertainment.summary: Following the success of Dhurandhar: The Revenge, Chitrangada Singh praised the work of Aditya Dhar and revealed that she had almost worked with him earlier.

entertainment.title: Moushumi Chatterjee says she got married at 15 to fulfill dying aunt's wish: ‘Everyone wanted me…’
entertainment.summary: Moushumi Chatterjee married producer Jayanta Mukherjee at the age of 15 after she made her debut in Balika Badhu in 1967.

entertainment.title: Exclusive | Director of Nora Fatehi's Body Roll reacts to claims that music video copies Netflix's Jibaro: If people…
entertainment.summary: Actor Nora Fatehi's latest music video with Yo Yo Honey Singh, Body Roll, is alleged to be ‘copied’ from a Netflix show. We speak to the music video's director.

entertainment.title: Emotional Mandana Karimi says she is leaving India after almost 16 years: ‘This is going to be hard’
entertainment.summary: Mandana Karimi called India her ‘second home’ and answered a fan that she is leaving India for good to live in a new country.

entertainment.title: Disha Patani unfollows Mouni Roy's husband Suraj Nambiar, he deletes Instagram account amid separation rumours
entertainment.summary: Mouni Roy and Suraj Nambiar are rumoured to have separated after unfollowing each other on Instagram.

entertainment.summary: The Duke and Duchess of Sussex enjoyed some fun and vibrant family time recently, at California's iconic adventure park. Here's a look at photos.

entertainment.title: ‘Indian students must be protected from the mafia’: Kamal Haasan as NEET exam gets cancelled over alleged paper leak
entertainment.summary: The National Testing Agency (NTA) on Tuesday cancelled the NEET (UG) 2026 exam held on May 3 amid allegations of paper leak.

entertainment.title: ‘Godzilla prn in Euphoria’: Viewers are not impressed by Sydney Sweeney's humiliating portrayal of sex work
entertainment.summary: The last episode of Euphoria aired recently and fan are divided. Viewers are criticising Sam Levinson's depiction of sex work through Sydney Sweeney.

entertainment.summary: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) chief and actor Vijay took oath as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister a few days ago, after scoring a majority to form a government.

entertainment.summary: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan fans are disappointed as L'Oreal Paris ignored her in a promotional video for Cannes 2026, featuring Alia Bhatt instead.
